nodes.title: Negative
widgets_values: different outfit, changed clothing, recolored clothes, wrong fabric, altered garment, wrong face, different identity, distorted clothing, extra accessories, cropped body, cut-off legs, low quality, blurry, deformed, extra limbs

nodes.title: How this works
widgets_values:
## Single-pass outfit + character draw (FLUX.2)

One generation that takes **1 clothing reference + 3 character face references** (FLUX.2 supports up to 10) via chained ReferenceLatent -> FluxKontextMultiReferenceLatentMethod('index').

- **Ref 1 = clothing** (best: garment isolated / ghost-mannequin, neutral background, full view).
- **Refs 2-4 = character faces** (use varied expressions/angles, clean backgrounds).
- FLUX.2 synthesizes the body, drapes the garment, and applies the face identity, directed by the prompt.
- Fewer than 3 faces? Bypass (Ctrl-B) the unused LoadImage+VAEEncode+ReferenceLatent for that slot.

Note: in a 1024x2048 full-body frame the face is small, so identity is softer than the dedicated high-res face-refine stage in vn_outfit_reference_draw_then_face_refine_flux2.json. Use that two-stage file if you need maximum face fidelity.

nodes.title: Positive (keep outfit + match face)
widgets_values:
Generate a natural, photorealistic full-body portrait photograph of a young Chinese woman, late afternoon natural window light coming from the left at an angle, producing soft but visible volumetric shadows that sculpt the face and body with clear three-dimensional form and high facial detail. Clean pure white seamless backdrop, professional character photography style, candid studio portrait quality.
She is standing naturally in contrapposto pose (weight shifted to one leg), arms relaxed at her sides, facing slightly toward the camera with elegant and confident posture. Long dark brown hair with soft gentle waves and loose curls.
Outfit: A form-fitting blue floor-length dress with thin spaghetti straps, square neckline, and a seductive high side slit revealing the thigh..
Reference Guidance:
Use the 4 character reference images to maintain exact facial features, identity, age, skin tone, body proportions, and overall appearance of the woman with perfect consistency. Use the 1 outfit reference image to accurately reproduce the exact bikini style, color, fabric texture, cut, strap details, and how it fits her body.
Natural elegant pose, highly detailed, realistic skin texture, masterpiece quality, best quality, photorealistic.

Three-stage FLUX2 outfit/character workflow.

Step 1: one-pass base draw uses outfit ref #1 plus character refs #1-2.
Step 2: body-minus-head mask uses YOLO person + SAM, subtracts a dilated face/head parsing mask, then inpaints outfit with outfit refs #1-3.
Step 3: face parsing mask refines the face with character refs #1-6.

Reference slots: outfit #1 is existing LoadImage node 10. Added outfit refs are the two LoadImage nodes near the outfit inpaint pass. Existing character refs #1-4 are nodes 11, 12, 13, and 61; two added character refs sit near the face-refine pass.

Refine and repaint only the masked clothing/body area using the outfit reference images. Preserve the same person identity, face, hairstyle, pose, body proportions, background, camera angle, and lighting. Match the garment silhouette, fabric, color, pattern, trim, seams, folds, and dressing style from the outfit references with clean photorealistic detail.

Replace and refine only the detected face using the character reference images. Preserve the outfit, body, pose, hairstyle, hair length, background, lighting, camera angle, and composition. Match the reference identity, facial structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin texture, and expression naturally.

identity mismatch with the face reference, changed hair, changed hairstyle, changed outfit, changed clothing, changed pose, changed camera angle, changed background, changed body, distorted face, melted skin, bad eyes, asymmetrical eyes, extra teeth, blurry face, harsh mask edge, visible seam
